properties.label: File Name / Path
properties.tooltip: Path to the delimited file to read. Supports context variables.

properties.label: CSV Options
properties.tooltip: When enabled, uses RFC 4180 CSV parsing with escape char and text enclosure

properties.label: Header
properties.tooltip: Number of header rows to skip

properties.label: Footer
properties.tooltip: Number of footer rows to skip from bottom

properties.label: Limit
properties.tooltip: Maximum rows to read. Supports context variables.

properties.label: Check Fields Number
properties.tooltip: Validate that each row has the expected number of fields

properties.label: Check Date
properties.tooltip: Validate date fields against schema patterns

properties.label: Password
properties.tooltip: Always empty -- never carry passwords into JSON
